evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Immunohistochemistry
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Membranous IHC staining in primary tissue sections.

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Immunofluorescence
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Non-permeabilized surface IF, plus permeabilized confocal IF that colocalizes with a plasma-membrane marker.

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Flow cytometry / FACS
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Surface staining of intact, non-permeabilized cells — the strongest direct surface-accessibility signal.

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Surface biotinylation
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Sulfo-NHS-biotin labeling of the cell surface + streptavidin pull-down — biochemical surface capture.
evidence_retrieval_categories.query_preview: ("surface biotinylation" OR "cell surface biotinylation" OR "biotin labeling" OR "biotinyl" OR "sulfo-NHS-biotin")

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Surfaceome mass spec
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Cell-surface-capture / surfaceome LC-MS/MS proteomics (the high-throughput membership datasets).
evidence_retrieval_categories.query_preview: ("surfaceome" OR "surface proteome" OR "cell surface proteomics" OR "cell-surface capture")

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Western blot (surface-paired)
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Immunoblot paired with a surface-biotinylation or membrane-fraction step (so the band is the surface pool).

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Structure with ECD
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Crystal / cryo-EM structures resolving an extracellular domain — confirms an exposed, foldable ectodomain.
evidence_retrieval_categories.query_preview: ("crystal structure" OR "cryo-EM" OR "cryo electron microscopy" OR "X-ray structure")

evidence_retrieval_categories.label: Other surface assays
evidence_retrieval_categories.finds: Catch-all: radioligand / GPCR pharmacology, ectodomain shedding, proximity labeling (APEX2/TurboID/BioID), internalization kinetics.
evidence_retrieval_categories.query_preview: ("cell surface" OR "plasma membrane" OR "surface expression" OR "cell-surface" OR "membrane localization")

literature_modes.label: NCBI gene2pubmed
literature_modes.finds: NCBI's curated gene→PMID list — the high-precision baseline every gene starts from.

literature_modes.label: Recent corpus (PubTator)
literature_modes.finds: Date-sorted PubTator entity sweep, pre-filtered on surface/membrane keywords — catches recent verdict-shifting papers the planner couldn't keyword-anchor.

literature_modes.label: Topic search
literature_modes.finds: Europe PMC topic-anchored queries the planner composes to fill method-specific gaps.

literature_modes.label: Fetch abstract
literature_modes.finds: Pull a single PMID's abstract (planner-chosen follow-up).

literature_modes.label: Fetch full text
literature_modes.finds: Pull a PMC open-access full text (planner-chosen deep read).
